MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Commissioner: Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: La Von Granger. Simon A. Mazzola, Esq. represented Plaintiff Larry Totten. John Joseph Hagen, Collection Manager of Laborers Trust Fund of Northern California was sworn and testified on behalf of the Plaintiff. On the basis of evidence received, the Court grants judgment as prayed for in the petition. See scanned document.
